# DQBench

> Standardized benchmark for data quality validation tools — the ImageNet of data quality.

## Interfaces
- CLI: `dqbench run <adapter>`, `dqbench run all`, `dqbench score`, + 5 more commands
- Python API: `from dqbench.runner import run_benchmark` — 20+ exports

## Install
- `pip install dqbench`

## Docs
- [Architecture](CLAUDE.md): Full codebase guide with scoring rules, patterns, and gotchas
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/dqbench/): Package page
- [GitHub](https://github.com/benzsevern/dqbench): Source
- [Full API Reference](llms-full.txt): Extended documentation with all function signatures and usage patterns
